title: CareerForge Industrial UI Overhaul
goal: Transform CareerForge AI's visual design to match world-class SaaS standards (Linear, Vercel, Stripe aesthetic) — beautiful, attractive, professional, modern, with industry-grade polish and micro-interactions throughout.

phases.name: Design System Foundation
phases.goal: Establish a reusable visual language (typography, colors, gradients, glassmorphism, micro-interaction primitives).
deliverables: src/app/layout.tsx (Plus Jakarta Sans font, OG meta)
phases.verify: npx tsc --noEmit && npm run lint && npm run build

phases.name: Landing Hero & Social Proof
phases.goal: Replace static hero with interactive 3D demo + real social proof (no fake company logos).
deliverables: GlassCard with hover glow wrapping the preview
Real credibility badges (G2, Product Hunt, 4.9★, GDPR)

phases.name: States & Footer
phases.verify: test -f src/app/not-found.tsx && test -f src/app/loading.tsx && test -f src/app/error.tsx

phases.name: Final Verification
phases.goal: Build + lint + dev server must all pass.
evidence: npm run build: ✓ Compiled in 6.1s, 40 routes
npm run dev: ✓ Ready in 656ms on port 3002 (3000 + 3001 already running)
phases.verify: Visit http://localhost:3001 — landing page renders all new visuals

pending.name: International Hygiene (Quick-Win Sprint)
items: next-intl i18n scaffold with messages/en.json + locale detection
Replace hardcoded $ with Intl.NumberFormat on landing & pricing
Add aria-labels to icon-only buttons (WCAG 2.2 AA)

pending.name: Job-Tailored Resume Variants (Feature #1)
pending.revenue_impact: highest $ ROI (Rezi charges $29/mo largely for this)
items: Add ResumeVersion model to prisma/schema.prisma (parentResumeId, label, jobDescription, matchScore)
Add Tailor button to SavedJob cards

pending.name: Multilingual UI + AI Translation (Feature #2)
items: Migrate all hardcoded English strings to t() calls

next_session_checklist: Read this file for phase status
Confirm dev server is on port 3001 (or restart with npm run dev)
Visit http://localhost:3001 to verify all changes are live
constraints_honored: Zero new npm packages added in this session
No breaking changes to API routes or Prisma schema
